description: Managed parent workflow in the step-addressed shape: draft-write invokes the worker-only review workflow via a cross-workflow step transition and resumes at apply-review with the callee result.

prompts.rielflowPromptTemplate: Coordinate {{workflowId}}. Start draft-write first, then wait for the workflow-call review result before apply-review runs.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Work only on the current node responsibility and return concise business JSON.
